en.extract:
The plain gerygone (Gerygone inornata) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae.  It is found on the islands of Wetar and Timor.  Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest.

The '''plain gerygone''' ('''''Gerygone inornata''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Acanthizidae]].  It is found on the islands of [[Wetar]] and [[Timor]].  Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]].
